name: G4 Doorbell Pro AC Adapter
title: G4 Doorbell Pro AC Adapter
short_description: Power adapter for G4 Doorbell Pro with a 7m long USB-C cable, EU power plug

detailed_description.text: The G4 Doorbell Pro AC Adapter from Ubiquiti is a specialized accessory designed to provide a reliable and continuous power supply to the G4 Doorbell Pro. This adapter ensures that the doorbell remains operational at all times, eliminating the need for battery replacements or concerns about power outages affecting its performance. Crafted with the high-quality standards associated with the Ubiquiti brand, this AC adapter is engineered to seamlessly integrate with the G4 Doorbell Pro's design and installation requirements.

Cable length 7 m
100—240V AC, 50/60 Hz, 0.3A input and 5V DC, 2A output
USB Type-C connectors on the both ends

Constructed to withstand the rigors of outdoor environments, the adapter features a durable build that can handle various weather conditions, ensuring long-term reliability and performance. Its compact size allows for a discreet installation, minimizing visual impact and preserving the aesthetic appeal of the installation site. The adapter is equipped with a standard plug that fits most outdoor and indoor outlets, offering flexibility in installation locations.

The G4 Doorbell Pro AC Adapter is designed for easy setup, allowing homeowners or installers to quickly connect the doorbell to a power source without the need for complex wiring or professional assistance. Its plug-and-play design ensures a hassle-free installation process, making it an ideal choice for those looking to enhance their home security system with continuous power supply.

Furthermore, this adapter is specifically tailored to match the power requirements of the G4 Doorbell Pro, providing the optimal voltage and current to ensure efficient operation. This compatibility eliminates the risk of power-related issues, ensuring that the doorbell functions optimally for capturing clear video and audio, as well as maintaining a reliable connection for smart home integrations.
